message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "European Survey of Enterprises on New and Emerging Risks (ESENER-2), 2014",
    "description": "Survey of companies with five or more employees from private and public organisations in all sectors of activity (including agriculture, forestry and fisheries, NACE A) across 36 European countries (EU Member States, EU28, plus Albania, Iceland, Macedonia (FYROM), Montenegro, Norway, Serbia, Switzerland and Turkey). Within each establishment, the person who knows best about health and safety in the establishment was interviewed.",
    "keywords": [
      "Working conditions",
      "Occupational health",
      "Health and safety",
      "Risk management",
      "Enterprises"
    ],
    "year": 2014,
    "coverage": {
      "countries": [
        "EU28",
        "Albania",
        "Iceland",
        "Macedonia (FYROM)",
        "Montenegro",
        "Norway",
        "Serbia",
        "Switzerland",
        "Turkey"
      ],
      "sectors": "All sectors, including NACE A",
      "minimum_employees": 5
    },
    "host": "GESIS"
  }
]
